commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Deadly sin. That is, sin which will bring death after it. (Challoner)
Hebrew, "lest they bear sin unto death "and fall like their brethren, chap. xvii. 13. (Haydock)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Deadly sin: That is, sin which will bring death after it.
